name: Word Mosaic
description: Word Mosaic is a fun and relaxing word puzzle game where you drag word fragments into a crossword-style board to complete hidden words. Solve connected puzzles, uncover bonus words through experimentation, and enjoy quick bite-sized levels that are easy to play anytime on desktop or mobile.
instructions: How to Play bull Drag word fragments from the tray at the bottom of the screen onto the empty slots on the board bull Place fragments in the correct order to complete hidden words bull Complete all target words to finish the level
